items.caption: I don’t use coffee machines at hotels but now I won’t use them at peoples houses 🫠 #cleantok #coffee #fyp #cleaning
items.transcript: I'm making coffee, anybody want coffee?

items.caption:
How to clean your bins and keep bugs and animals out of them. 🐛🐻
One step I forgot to show here was I poured some Pine-Sol in the bottom of the bins to soften the gunk and filled with a bit of water and let them soak for an hour in the sun! @Pine-Sol 
#fyp #CleanTok #outdoorcleaning #garbage

Come find my custom DIRTY SODA on the secret influencer menu at @covet sips + sweets at the Calgary Stampede from July 3rd-12th.

Dirty Bastard by @gocleanco

• Coke zero, extra ice
• A splash of fresh raspberry purée 
• A splash of peach purée 
• Two fresh lime wedges 
• Finished with a drizzle of coconut cream

it’s sweet, tart, cream, fizzy - tastes just like summer. 

If your headed to stampede, order my dirty soda, you dirty bastards. 🤠🥤
#calgarystampede #dirtysoda #stampede2026
